factions.name: Iron Covenant
factions.blurb: Grim smith-priests who forge oaths in iron and ash.

factions.name: Bloodthorn Clans
factions.blurb: Savage reavers who crown their dead in thorns.

factions.name: House Veyr
factions.blurb: A fading royal line clutching a stolen throne.

factions.name: Ashen Host
factions.blurb: The marching dead of a buried empire.

factions.name: Verdant Court
factions.blurb: Old powers of root and rot, neither kind nor cruel.

factions.name: Obsidian Legion
factions.blurb: Sorcerer-warlords bound to a black, hungry star.
